welcome.title: Welcome to MetaMates
welcome.subtitle: For people with too many sparks and too little time to organize
welcome.description: You don't need a note-taking system first. Two parts, one loop:
welcome.desktopNote: Fragments go into the inspiration vault on the left; **the thinking engine on the right is your daily starting point**—results land in files, data stays on your machine.

features.agent: Thinking engine — chat on the right is the main entry; one sentence to start
features.commands: Methodology commands — 15 slash commands like `/today`, `/graduate`: read vault, process, write back
features.vault: Inspiration vault — diary, inbox, project notes as local Markdown
features.capture: Mobile capture — drop ideas into the vault Inbox from your phone

workspace.title: Choose your inspiration vault
workspace.description: Pick a local folder for fragments, diary, and project notes. The thinking engine reads and writes here. On first run we create inbox, diary, and more—**messy first, organized later**.
workspace.skillsSynced: Synced {{count}} command template item(s) (memory index & methodology guides)
workspace.desktopOnly: This step is for the desktop app only

complete.title: Your vault is ready
complete.subtitle: Next: enable the thinking engine—pick an AI assistant, about 2 minutes to install and sign in.
